case_title: THE SAGRES COMPANY, ASSIGNEE AND SUCCESSOR VS. REBECCA LUM et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-21-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-12-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-21-2005 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE SAGRES COMPANY, ASSIGNEE AND SUCCESSOR AS TO DEFENDANT LUM, REBECCA AKA REBECCA ROSEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-12-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-07-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-28-2005
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE SAGRES COMPANY, ASSIGNEE AND SUCCESSOR
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-21-2005 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-12-2005 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ANGIE C. HONG, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-12-2005 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-27-2005. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: VICKI GROSS. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., specially appeared for plaintiff. At the request of the plaintiff's counsel case dismissed without prejudice. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez (212)

Off Calendar Jul-28-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-21-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
